name: L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS
address: Alley No. 683 Lac Long Quan Street, Quận Tây Hồ, Hà Nội, Việt Nam
description:
L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS

Khi quý khách đang tìm kiếm một chỗ ở thoải mái và tiện lợi tại Hà Nội, hãy biến L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS thành ngôi nhà thứ hai của mình. Việc ở lại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS giúp quý khách dễ dàng tiếp cận thành phố sôi động này và tất cả những điều kỳ thú của nó.
Hãy tận dụng vô vàn dịch vụ và tiện ích không có gì sánh được tại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS. Dễ dàng cập nhật mọi thông tin liên lạc của quý khách với Wi-Fi miễn phí của khách sạn.
Chuyến khám phá Hà Nội của quý khách có thể được hỗ trợ bởi các dịch vụ taxi và xe đưa đón có sẵn. Bãi đỗ xe có sẵn và miễn phí, được khách sạn cung cấp cho những khách có phương tiện di chuyển riêng. Dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng có thể hỗ trợ các nhu cầu của quý khách. Cho những kỳ nghỉ dài hơn hoặc bất cứ khi nào quý khách cần, dịch vụ giặt là giữ cho những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của quý khách luôn sạch sẽ và sẵn sàng. Các tiện ích trong phòng bao gồm dịch vụ tại phòng và dọn phòng hằng ngày, vì vậy bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình.
Các phòng nghỉ được thiết kế để mang đến mức độ thoải mái tối ưu với lối trang trí thân thiện và tiện nghi thiết yếu. Cho sự thoải mái cho quý khách, một số phòng tại khách sạn được trang bị điều hòa.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Bắt đầu mỗi buổi sáng tại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS với bữa sáng hấp dẫn được phục vụ trong khuôn viên. Một loạt các lựa chọn ăn uống tiện lợi và ngon miệng đang chờ quý khách tại khách sạn, bất cứ khi quý khách quý khách cảm thấy đói.
Một khi đến đó, hãy nhớ ghé qua quán bar để tận hưởng một số thú vui ban đêm ngay tại chỗ. L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS có các máy bán hàng tự động cung cấp đồ uống giải khát suốt ngày đêm với mức giá rẻ.
Hàng loạt dịch vụ giải trí của khách sạn đảm bảo quý khách có nhiều việc để làm trong thời gian quý khách ở lại đây. Chiều chuộng và nuông chiều bản thân với một chuyến ghé qua xông khô và spa.
Bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng việc tắm mát trong bể bơi. Bỏ qua quy định về ăn mặc và chọn một ly cocktail hoặc bia bình dị tại quầy bar bên bể bơi của khách sạn.
Khám phá trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn để giữ sức khỏe và săn chắc trong kỳ nghỉ. Dễ dàng tận hưởng niềm vui mà không phải đi đâu xa, khi chơi tại sân gôn nhỏ ở L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS. Hãy vui vẻ với bạn bè hoặc gia đình của quý khách, hoặc thậm chí gặp gỡ những người mới tại phòng chờ chung và khu vực TV. Chọn một thứ gì đó đáng nhớ cho chính quý khách hoặc những người đang chờ đợi quý khách ở nhà tại Cửa hàng.

sample_comments.text: Tôi rất hài lòng tổng thể. Nơi đây có rất nhiều tiện ích vì nằm trong khu phức hợp như Lotte Mall. Vị trí cách sân bay khoảng 30 phút lái xe, tuy có vẻ xa trung tâm Hà Nội nhưng cảm giác không quá xa. Nó gần hơn so với khoảng cách từ sân bay Incheon vào trung tâm Seoul. Phòng rất thoải mái và sạch sẽ. Có thể nhìn thấy Hồ Tây từ xa, cảnh sắc thật sự rất đẹp. Tôi chưa thử nhà hàng nên không biết. Hồ bơi nằm ở tầng cao nhất nên dễ dàng tiếp cận và cảnh quan nhìn ra rất tuyệt vời. Nhân viên đều rất thân thiện, không quá nhiều cũng không quá ít. Có 4 thang máy rất tiện lợi. Tôi đã sử dụng dịch vụ massage trong khách sạn và rất hài lòng. Nhân viên thân thiện, giá cả hợp lý và không gian sạch sẽ. Kỹ năng cũng rất tốt.
sample_comments.title: Rất tốt.
Hài lòng
sample_comments.positives: Vị trí
sample_comments.negatives: Bồn tắm chưa được sạch lắm

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: - Connected to Lotte Mall and lots of great restaurant choices- Contemporary design- Helpful staff throughout hotel

sample_comments.text: Truy cập rất dễ dàng, trực tiếp nối với trung tâm mua sắm nên vào ban đêm có thể thoải mái đi dạo trong trung tâm mua sắm và thư giãn tại quán cà phê. Tim Ho Wan nằm ở tầng 6 trong khách sạn có giá cả giống như trong cửa hàng và phục vụ tận phòng. Dịch vụ phòng cũng rất ngon miệng và bữa sáng có cả món Hàn Quốc, tôi rất hài lòng.
sample_comments.title: Tất cả hoàn hảo.
Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Đã đến nhiều lần và lần nào cũng rất hài lòng

sample_comments.text: Có lẽ vì là một phòng nhỏ ở góc nên tôi đã tình cờ thấy được phòng giá rẻ và ở lại 2 đêm rất thoải mái. Tầng 1 có Lotte Mall với nhiều nhà hàng, nếu không phải ăn sáng sớm thì việc không bao gồm bữa sáng cũng không sao. Ngoài ra, ở sảnh tầng 1 có một nhà hàng nhỏ. Combo phở + cà phê giá 250.000 đồng, giá hơi cao nhưng khẩu phần nhiều và ngon. Hoặc bạn cũng có thể ăn bánh nhẹ với cà phê. Hồ bơi thì hơi nhỏ, nhưng cảnh đẹp nên đáng để ghé thăm một lần. Với sự tiện lợi như vậy, nếu có dịp đến quận 4 lần nữa, chắc tôi sẽ chọn ở lại đây.
sample_comments.title: Tôi đã khỏe.
Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: Ổ cắm đầu giường không hoạt động

sample_comments.text: Phòng khách sạn khá nhỏ, bể bơi nhỏ. Ăn sáng ngon. Khách sạn thiết kế đẹp và sạch sẽ. Nhân viên hỗ trợ tương đối tốt.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn tuyệt vời cho kỳ nghỉ ngắn ngày hoặc công tác
Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: Tôi đã bị lộ thẻ tín dụng khi thanh toán tiền ở đây

sample_comments.text:
Địa điểm thật lý tưởng, tiện nghi thì tuyệt vời, và dịch vụ thì hoàn hảo.
Mọi thứ đều thật xuất sắc.
Khung cảnh bữa sáng, kết hợp với đồ ăn, thật sự đẹp ngoạn mục.
Phòng tập thể dục và hồ bơi cũng rất thuận tiện và thoải mái.
Ngay cả sự kết nối trực tiếp đến Lotte Mall cũng làm cho đây trở thành một nơi hoàn hảo cho du khách.
sample_comments.title: Mọi thứ đều hoàn hảo.
Not Open to the world
sample_comments.text: Staff can't understand English, no balcony, no smoking rooms, breakfast not to international standard.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. El Chaar Raja,

Thank you very much for choosing our home during your recent visit and taking the time to share your concern!

At L7 West Lake Hanoi by LOTTE, we always strive to provide the best service and facilities. And when your expectations are not met, we have failed in our primary endeavor. sample_comments.title: A forgettable stay at L7 West Lake Hanoi
sample_comments.text:
Have you ever stayed in a 5 star hotel and woke up the next morning finding the entire room floor wet for no reason?

My family and I experienced that recently at L7 West Lake Hanoi which we booked 2 rooms for 3 nights. On 3 occasions (happened once in my room, twice in my parents' room) the entire floor from the balcony to the bathroom turned wet and slippery the next morning. I nearly slipped and fell while getting out of bed to walk to the bathroom in the morning. We did our own housekeeping (we reckon calling their room service will take ages), wiping the floor which took more than an hour to dry completely. Throughout our stay we had to worry for our elderly parents who were in another room by themselves. 

We reported the matter to the hotel who blamed it on the humid weather in Hanoi. Having stayed in different hotels around Asia, in particular Halong Bay and Ho Chi Minh which the humidity could get very extreme, we have not encountered such a bizzare experience in our lives. A fall might be very costly. It might even result in a human life, especially the vulnerable elderly. We plead with the hotel not to take the matter lightly and hope they will take adequate measures to resolve the issue before an injury happens. 

Location wise, living next to a mall might seem ideal to some. But if you are not a 'mall person' you might want to look somewhere else. Most of the shops are probably replicated from a typical mall in your home country. Apart from the mall there are not many shops to eat or shop around the vicinity. Stay somewhere nearer to Old Quarter if you want to experience authentic Hanoi food and shopping that relates more to the locals. 

The sound insulation in the hotel rooms was bad. Even though we stayed on a high floor we could still hear the noise from the surrounding traffic and activities, be it day or night, with our balcony door locked. This was especially disruptive when our parents needed to take afternoon naps. 

Online reviews on the overall staff service was mixed. For us we were not overly impressed. I shall leave it to you to judge.

sample_comments.title: The new and mediocrity
sample_comments.text:
My short stay at Hotel Mediocrity was as stated, underwhelming and sometimes frustrating. I booked through Agoda, and I understood that sometimes misunderstanding happened, but some simple messages like not paying for the breakfast package (which I had clearly informed the reservationist and got confirmation from the hotel) still got lost in the communication process between staff, and I got to explain again and again about our booking quite a few times with the front desk and restaurant receptionist. 

Speaking of restaurant, another terrible experience. Food are cold and lukewarm with little diversity and clearly not prepared with "much care and love" as advertised. Thank God we did not sign up for the whole stay's breakfast package while the food in the Lotte mall or any street vendors in the vicinity is much better. 

The room we book is a family room, clearly not the VIP, which still doesn't explain the lack of planning and care when designing it. It feels cramped with poor layout. The decors and quality of room furniture make it feel cheaper than staying in a alledged 5 star hotel should. I don't even think the view to the West Lake is that justified when every sight was intruded with the ugly frames. Except for the pool at the top I guess, which was too small and oh boy, 4-5 families with 1 kid in and we were already fighting for swimming or jacuzzi spot.

This is not to bad-mouth the actual everyday staff including housekeepers who are quite cordial and trying to help at the best of their ability. I just think the management and restaurants are not the best. The Lotte Hotel in the same chain, except 10 years older and in the city, was much better for service and food quality even with more worn out facilities.

sample_comments.title: One of the most disappointing 5-star hotel experiences.
sample_comments.text:
I had higher expectations for the price of over 4 million VND per night, but the actual experience was not really worth it. The room is quite small (38m²), while I am used to staying in spaces that are twice as large at other hotels in the same price range. This made me feel uncomfortable and a bit stuffy compared to my expectations.

Additionally, the view is nothing impressive. The mattress is also not very relaxing, slightly hard and lacking in elasticity, only at an acceptable level but not providing the comfort I had hoped for.

Perhaps the hotel is more suitable for those who need to head to the airport early or want to shop before flying, thanks to its location right at the foot of the Nhat Tan Bridge - extremely convenient for traveling to Noi Bai Airport - and having a shopping center right within the complex. However, if you are looking for a truly comfortable, spacious, and relaxing space that embodies the essence of a getaway, there are likely many other 5-star options worth considering.

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable stay, exceptional service, luxurious facilities, and a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
sample_comments.positives:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at L7 West Lake Hanoi, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations. From the moment I stepped into the hotel, I was greeted with a warm welcome and a level of care that set the tone for the rest of my stay.

The employees at L7 West Lake Hanoi deserve special recognition for their exceptional service. From the front desk staff to the concierge and the housekeeping team, every interaction was marked by a genuine friendliness and a strong desire to ensure my comfort and satisfaction. They were always ready to assist, going above and beyond to accommodate my needs and preferences.

The facilities at L7 West Lake Hanoi are truly deserving of their 5-star rating. The hotel boasts a modern and stylish design that effortlessly blends elegance with comfort. The rooms are spacious, tastefully decorated, and equipped with state-of-the-art amenities that cater to every need. The plush bedding and high-quality linens provided a restful and rejuvenating sleep experience.

One of the highlights of my stay was the breathtaking view of West Lake from my room. The serene beauty of the lake, especially during sunrise and sunset, added an extra touch of tranquility to my stay. Additionally, the hotel's fitness center and spa facilities were top-notch, offering a range of wellness options to help guests unwind and rejuvenate.

The staff at L7 West Lake Hanoi consistently demonstrated a high level of professionalism and efficiency. From the moment I made a reservation until I checked out, their attention to detail and promptness in handling any requests or inquiries were truly commendable. They provided valuable recommendations for local attractions and dining options, ensuring that I experienced the best of what Hanoi had to offer.

The friendliness and effectiveness of the staff were truly exceptional. They treated me like a valued guest, and their genuine warmth and hospitality made me feel at home throughout my stay.

My room was spacious and tastefully decorated with comfortable furnishings. However, it would have been nice to have additional seating other than the desk chair. The bed was cozy, and the amenities provided were sufficient for a comfortable stay. 

The only downside to my stay was the noise disturbance from the outside as I could still hear noises from the street (honking and construction noise), which occasionally disrupted my rest. This was a minor inconvenience, but it did detract slightly from the otherwise peaceful atmosphere of the hotel.

sample_comments.positives: 조식이 매우 다양하고 맛있었습니다. 롯데몰과 이어져 있어 쇼핑 및 시간 보내기에도 좋습니다. 공항에서 메인 도로 타고 하노이 들어오는 초입에 있어 공항과의 시간도 가깝습니다.

sample_comments.title: A good hotel for "hokans."
sample_comments.text: Although it is located away from the city center, it is directly connected to Lotte Mall, and the hotel itself has excellent facilities, making it a great place to relax and enjoy the beautiful West Lake. There is also a tour desk that arranges day trips departing from the hotel and they were very considerate in various ways. The hotel staff were all friendly, and they offered help when I was in trouble, assisting with spa reservations and other support, which was very nice.

sample_comments.title: 만족 :)
sample_comments.positives:
조식 - 쌀국수(강추), 다양한 계란 요리, 한식도 맛있었지만, 커피/차도 따로 주문 받아서 갖다주셔서, 베트남 커피를 즐겼는데 정말 맛있었어요. 식당에서 바라보는 서호 뷰도 좋았구요. 
또, 투어 참여 등으로 조식을 먹지 못할 것 같으면 미리 요청하여 리셉션에서 도시락을 받을 수 있어요. 새벽 5시에도 조식 도시락을 무리없이 수령했습니다. 

직원들도 모두 친절하게 응대해주시고, 수건, 휴지 등 필요한걸 요청드릴 때 빠르게 서비스해주셨어요. 

숙소 컨디션도 넓고, 깨끗하고, 인테리어도 다 훌륭했습니다. 

특히 신한은행/우리은행 트래블카드를 사용하는 분들에겐 최고의 숙소예요. 호텔과 연결된 롯데몰에 atm기가 있어요.
sample_comments.negatives:
조식을 미리 도시락처럼 가져갈 수 있게 부탁해서 받는 서비스 자체는 너무 좋았어요. (양도 3단으로 푸짐해요. 빵or김밥 / 양식or한식 / 과일 + 생수 )

그런데 조식 도시락을 종이 봉투로 양식/한식 한 세트씩 받았을 때, 
아무래도 도시락 용기가 뚜껑이 살짝만 닫히는 것이다 보니 
그랩을 잡아 타고 이동하는 동안에 
한식 도시락 용기 중 하나에 제육볶음이 담겨있었는데 국물이 새어 나왔어요. 

조식 메뉴들 다 맛있고 좋았는데, 도시락용기 특성상 양념국물을 없는 음식을 포장해주시는 게 더 좋을 것 같습니다.

sample_comments.title: A brand new, Awesome hotel to stay in Hanoi.
sample_comments.text:
It is a brand new, located in the Lotte mall in Hanoi. As it is newly built, the facilities are awesome and clean.

The club lounge is cozy. It offers a good selection of light snacks and drinks. Especially the staffs at the club floor, Mr. Zack and William, were very friendly and professional to help my requests for the stay and lounge usage. They provided the best service I have ever experienced anywhere in the world, even thinking of me staying at L7 again if I have a chance to visit Hanoi again.

Only a downside is the location of the hotel. It is located in the Lotte mall, so it was easy to go shopping at Lotte mart and etc, but the outside of the mall site, there are not many local stuff to enjoy like restaurants and etc.

Overall, I highly recommend this hotel if you want to relax a bit, enjoying the service in the hotel. And thanks to Zack again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest,

Thank you for your glowing review! We're thrilled to hear that you had a fantastic experience during your stay at L7 West Lake Hanoi by LOTTE.

It's wonderful to know that you found our brand-new facilities to be awesome and clean, and that you enjoyed the cozy atmosphere of our club lounge. 

Your feedback regarding the hotel's location is appreciated. While we're glad you found the convenience of being in Lotte Mall beneficial, we understand that you may have wanted more local options outside of the mall. We'll take your comments into consideration as we continue to improve our offerings.

Thank you for recommending our hotel for a relaxing stay and exceptional service. We can't wait to welcome you back to L7 West Lake Hanoi by LOTTE for another memorable experience in the future!

Warm regards,

Helena Lee
General Manager
L7 West Lake Hanoi by LOTTE

sample_comments.title: Very good.
sample_comments.text: Overall, I am very satisfied. The facility is rich in amenities as it is located in the same complex as Lotte Mall. The location from the airport is a 30-minute drive, and it seems to be considered on the outskirts of Hanoi, but it doesn't feel far in terms of distance. It is closer than the distance into downtown Seoul from Incheon Airport. The room was very comfortable and clean. The view is really nice as it shows the West Lake and is not far from downtown Hanoi. I haven't used the restaurant, so I can't comment on that. The swimming pool is on the top floor, making it easily accessible and offering excellent views. All the staff are friendly, neither excessive nor lacking. There are four elevators, which is convenient. I have used the massage service within the hotel, and it was very good. The staff was kind, the prices were reasonable, and everything was clean. Their skills are excellent.

sample_comments.title: The best thing about our trip to Vietnam
sample_comments.text:
This was our first (probably the last) trip to Vietnam and the hotel was the best thing about the trip.

It was exactly like the pictures and everything about it was good enough for us. The staffs were kind and were willing to assist us in best possible way, well-mannered and gentle. Our hotel room was big enough and clean. Room service was good and delivered on time, fairly. The facilities at the hotel were new-ish and kinda elegant as well.

We couldn't get the massage at the hotel as it was fully booked and that was the only thing we didn't get to enjoy at the hotel. It was right next to the Lotte Mall, connected. Only 15mind Grab ride to Old Quarter so all in all, it was good, definitely recommending this 5 stars hotel to anyone traveling to Hanoi.

The reason for the overall comment only at 5 because of the inflexibility of the credit card booking policy. 
This is my business trip so the secretary helped to use the Company credit card for booking. When I checked in, the front desk insisted I had to present the same credit card - even all payment had been done. Otherwise, the hotel would refund the payment and I needed to use my personal credit card to process the booking again. 

The most frustrated part is, no advance notice was given for communication or preparation. 

Since this is my first time facing such policy, I would like to write for recommending for changing such policy. Or, you should let the guest knows all options so could get prepared for the request.

Hi - i stayed here for one night and could have easily stayed more - the rooms are nice with great views and adequate space - the desk was very helpful in early check in and that really helped us rest better since we came in early morning !

sample_comments.title: Almost the perfect stay, if they didn't call a scammer taxi service
sample_comments.positives: The hotel in general is great. New, comfortable, and a great pool at the rooftop with a beautiful view to the lake. Nice rooftop bar, great playground for the kids, and other facilities. All excellent! Also, direct access to the Mall which has a lot of options for eating and shopping. The location is great because just 20/30m from the airport and near west lake to go by foot. Finally, all the amenities in the room are great.
sample_comments.negatives: There was only one thing I didn't like, when they called me a taxi. The taxi driver wasn't serious and went for a large route. I know this because I live in Hanoi and I know the way. Also, I used other taxis to go to the same place and always paid 70k, whereas this time I had to pay 160k. Being such a nice hotel, they should be careful with the taxi drivers they call for their customers.. my advice is ask them to call a taxi from the company Taxi123.

sample_comments.title: I've been doing well.
sample_comments.text: Perhaps it was because it was a small room in a corner, but I accidentally came across a budget room and spent two pleasant nights there. There are many restaurants connected to the Lotte Mall on the first floor, so if you don't need to have breakfast early, it's fine to skip the breakfast option. Additionally, there is a small restaurant in the lobby on the first floor. The rice noodle and coffee combo costs 250,000 VND, which is a bit pricey, but the portion is large and the taste is good. Alternatively, you can just have coffee with a light pastry. The swimming pool is a bit small, but the view is so beautiful that it's worth a visit. The convenience is excellent, so if I have another chance to go to Seoho, I think I will book a stay there again.

The staff were exceptionally attentive, helpful, and friendly throughout our stay. A special shoutout to the lobby team, doormen, and front office staff, we truly felt very well taken care of.

The room and beds were clean and comfortable.

We loved it so much, initially we booked 2 nights and came back for another 2 nights
sample_comments.negatives:

Service at breakfast was inconsistent. On some occasions, staff proactively offered hot drinks, while at other times no one approached our table, even as they attended to others. We often had to seek out staff ourselves to order hot drinks.

MIJIN 고객님, 안녕하십니까?

sample_comments.title: L7 hotel with family

sample_comments.title: Stunning Modern Hotel
sample_comments.text: I was in awe at this hotel, booked last minute before a flight out of Hanoi. The design and architecture of this property is stunning, very modern and aesthetic. The sauna and steam room are wonderful, large rootop pool area with an outdoor bar. The room was beyond expectations - better than the photos with a huge bed, excellent shower and great soap amenities by Malin+Goetz. Breakfast was also exceptional - this is a Korean hotel so lots of Korean food options, Vietnamese and western. They allowed me an hour late check-out and held my luggage while I visited the connected lotte mall. I wish I had stayed here my whole trip in Hanoi - it's 20min drive from the old quarter but it's worth it. On the other hand it is 20mins to the airport which made my trip a lot easier!

sample_comments.title: A hotel where you experience the best service.
sample_comments.text: Just make a reservation without asking. I'm really 500% satisfied. This place offers service that goes beyond a 5-star rating. My time at this hotel was very comfortable and enjoyable. The interior is luxurious, and the breakfast is delicious as everyone says; I had a hearty Korean meal! The fitness gym is spacious, with a variety of equipment, well-maintained, making it great for exercise, and the sauna is really nice! However, there's an issue with whether to take off or put on shoes when entering the sauna (locker room)---different staff have different practices, and I hope this can be addressed. The room condition is good, and the bedding is incredibly comfortable. It would be great if the club lounge added more grill menu items during dinner time, and I was impressed by the manager who assisted me at check-in with their kind attitude when I encountered them randomly later, checking on my satisfaction and providing guidance on my travel route (thanks to William!!). Lotte Mall is just a 3-minute walk away, making it convenient! A hotel that satisfies in every aspect: location, interior, service, and food!!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional stay!
sample_comments.text: Exceptional stay, hotel is new and clean. Food is great, would come back again!

sample_comments.title: Highest satisfaction
sample_comments.text:
From the moment I entered the hotel, the staff's service was excellent. The clean facilities are also very nice. The amenities and hair dryer are all of good quality!! Even the card key is so cute, along with the movie tickets for Lotte Cinema in Hanoi!

You can watch YouTube and Netflix, but you have to input your personal ID.

Compared to the guests, there were fewer people in the swimming pool. The size is smaller than expected, but it was nice to play in a quieter environment (I gave up on the view due to fine dust). I used it in December, and the water was lukewarm, while the jacuzzi had hotter water. There is also a kids' pool.

I definitely recommend having breakfast. There are many Korean dishes, and during my four-night stay, the soups and kimbap varieties kept changing (seaweed soup, soybean paste soup, kimchi stew... beef kimbap, fish cake kimbap, tuna kimbap, crab stick kimbap...). There are many types of eggs, including hard-boiled eggs, soft-boiled, fried, and scrambled (they'll make scrambled upon request)! There are many types of bread, and it is really delicious!! The fruit was mediocre compared to my expectations, which was disappointing. Still, I looked forward to breakfast every day.

Dinner is also nice to try once. If you stay, there's a 10% discount!! Compared to hotels in Seoul, there are fewer options. However, there are more seafood and meat selections that weren't available at breakfast. (The steak was a bit tough, and the lobster was somewhat inconvenient to eat, but I tried it once for fun.) Sushi had few options, and the rice was too thick.

Steak is unlimited, but it's disappointing that drinks, including water and soda, come at additional costs. The variety of bread at breakfast was good, and there are various mini cakes, but they were not impressive. The fruit was the same as at breakfast.

Nonetheless, it's nice and convenient that Lotte Mart and the facilities are all connected to the hotel. 

If I come to Hanoi again, I will definitely revisit!

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable Anniversary Celebration at L7 Lotte!
sample_comments.text:
My partner and I recently celebrated our anniversary at L7 Lotte, and it was an exceptional experience! From the warm welcome by Mark, who made us feel right at home, to the thoughtful anniversary cake waiting in our room, every detail was impeccable.

Our room was fantastic, featuring a bidet and bathtub - a lovely surprise, especially the Japanese-style bidet! The connected Lotte Mall offered a wealth of amenities, including an aquarium and cinema, which our 11-year-old thoroughly enjoyed. The breakfast buffet was impressive, with a wide variety of options and stunning views. A special treat for our daughter was having ice cream for breakfast!

Mark's kindness extended to offering us a takeaway breakfast with Korean or Western options, perfect for our early flight. We also explored the surrounding area, stocking up on snacks at Lotte Mart and enjoying delicious, affordable Japanese cuisine at the mall's restaurant.

If I have any feedback, it would be that our 17th-floor room was somewhat noisy due to traffic outside. Additional insulation might help alleviate this issue. Moreover, the sink area in our room could benefit from more countertop space.

Overall, our stay at L7 Lotte was wonderful, and we eagerly anticipate our next visit. Thank you, Mark, and the entire L7 Lotte team, for making our anniversary celebration truly unforgettable!

sample_comments.text:
Great hotel with so many good facilities, staffs are helpful.
This hotel is connected to the Lotte mall and if you're looking for the minimart, there's one located in 6th floor on residence side.
Only down side is the A/C always cut off when reaching the temp you set up for, I know it's the normal system, but for people who easily get hot, I woke up 1-2times in the middle of the night due to that matter (even I set it up at 20c)

sample_comments.title: I strongly recommend the L7 Seoho Hanoi Lotte Hotel.
sample_comments.text:
We decided to travel to Hanoi to celebrate our 25th wedding anniversary. Although there are many hotels, we carefully examined numerous reviews and chose this hotel. The result was complete satisfaction. I especially think the concierge service unique to this hotel was the best.

My husband suddenly had a toothache, and I developed a fever due to the heat and urgently needed pain relievers, but what we had brought, aspirin, was insufficient.

Hanoi has many pharmacies, but it was too hot and difficult to go to the one across the street that night, so we decided to ask the hotel for help. At the concierge desk, we met a young man named Vance Arden. After reassuring us, Vance returned to our room about 30 minutes later with the exact medication we needed, just as if he were fetching medicine for his parents. He carefully explained the note the pharmacist had written and stayed to ensure we took the medicine, showing genuine concern for our well-being.

Just that kind of care and attention seemed to alleviate the fever significantly. This experience felt truly special and warm. Just think about being comforted and cared for by a stranger in a foreign country.

While I could write about recommended restaurants and massage centers, the experience of meeting good people in a foreign country is truly unforgettable. So, I leave this review to highlight the exceptional concierge service of this hotel and the goodwill demonstrated by Vance. I hope the hotel becomes even more famous for having such excellent staff. It was truly a great experience. Thank you.

secondary.description_full:
L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS

Khi quý khách đang tìm kiếm một chỗ ở thoải mái và tiện lợi tại Hà Nội, hãy biến L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS thành ngôi nhà thứ hai của mình. Việc ở lại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS giúp quý khách dễ dàng tiếp cận thành phố sôi động này và tất cả những điều kỳ thú của nó.
Hãy tận dụng vô vàn dịch vụ và tiện ích không có gì sánh được tại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS. Dễ dàng cập nhật mọi thông tin liên lạc của quý khách với Wi-Fi miễn phí của khách sạn.
Chuyến khám phá Hà Nội của quý khách có thể được hỗ trợ bởi các dịch vụ taxi và xe đưa đón có sẵn. Bãi đỗ xe có sẵn và miễn phí, được khách sạn cung cấp cho những khách có phương tiện di chuyển riêng. Dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng có thể hỗ trợ các nhu cầu của quý khách. Cho những kỳ nghỉ dài hơn hoặc bất cứ khi nào quý khách cần, dịch vụ giặt là giữ cho những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của quý khách luôn sạch sẽ và sẵn sàng. Các tiện ích trong phòng bao gồm dịch vụ tại phòng và dọn phòng hằng ngày, vì vậy bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình.
Các phòng nghỉ được thiết kế để mang đến mức độ thoải mái tối ưu với lối trang trí thân thiện và tiện nghi thiết yếu. Cho sự thoải mái cho quý khách, một số phòng tại khách sạn được trang bị điều hòa.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Bắt đầu mỗi buổi sáng tại L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS với bữa sáng hấp dẫn được phục vụ trong khuôn viên. Một loạt các lựa chọn ăn uống tiện lợi và ngon miệng đang chờ quý khách tại khách sạn, bất cứ khi quý khách quý khách cảm thấy đói.
Một khi đến đó, hãy nhớ ghé qua quán bar để tận hưởng một số thú vui ban đêm ngay tại chỗ. L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS có các máy bán hàng tự động cung cấp đồ uống giải khát suốt ngày đêm với mức giá rẻ.
Hàng loạt dịch vụ giải trí của khách sạn đảm bảo quý khách có nhiều việc để làm trong thời gian quý khách ở lại đây. Chiều chuộng và nuông chiều bản thân với một chuyến ghé qua xông khô và spa.
Bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng việc tắm mát trong bể bơi. Bỏ qua quy định về ăn mặc và chọn một ly cocktail hoặc bia bình dị tại quầy bar bên bể bơi của khách sạn.
Khám phá trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn để giữ sức khỏe và săn chắc trong kỳ nghỉ. Dễ dàng tận hưởng niềm vui mà không phải đi đâu xa, khi chơi tại sân gôn nhỏ ở L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS. Hãy vui vẻ với bạn bè hoặc gia đình của quý khách, hoặc thậm chí gặp gỡ những người mới tại phòng chờ chung và khu vực TV. Chọn một thứ gì đó đáng nhớ cho chính quý khách hoặc những người đang chờ đợi quý khách ở nhà tại Cửa hàng.

embedding_text:
L7 WEST LAKE HANOI by LOTTE HOTELS - khách sạn 5.0 sao tại Hà Nội.
Địa chỉ: Alley No. 683 Lac Long Quan Street, Quận Tây Hồ, Hà Nội, Việt Nam.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý.
